tasks.label: build-dev
tasks.command: npm run esbuild --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/ext-postgres && npm run build --workspace=packages/ext-mysql && npm run build --workspace=packages/ext-sqlite && npm run build --workspace=packages/ext-mssql && npm run build --workspace=packages/ext-oracle

tasks.label: build-dev-postgres-only
tasks.command: npm run esbuild --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/ext-postgres
